content: لَمّا تَدخُل الْمَعْبَد مِش هَتَصَدَّق إن دَه حَقيقي
translations: eng:when you go into this temple you will not believe it's real

transcriptions.arabizi: lamma tadchul guwailmaAbad mish hatsadda' 'in dah ha'ee'i
